cooking.name: Cooking
cooking.desc: Trained by completing the morning bake.

fishing.name: Fishing
fishing.desc: Trained by every catch — the day's target fish teaches most.

perception.name: Perception
perception.desc: Trained by finding and opening chests.

endurance.name: Endurance
endurance.desc: Trained by distance walked and finished patrols.

intellect.name: Intellect
intellect.desc: Trained by the whispers of the magick cave and the pages of lost books.

speechcraft.name: Speech-Craft
speechcraft.desc: Trained by conversing with the townsfolk.

luck.name: Luck
luck.desc: Trained by rare finds. Or is it the other way around?

guile.name: Guile
guile.desc: Trained by deeds not yet written.
